summary: First-finish smoke testing for HappyMilesTours. All 5 backend endpoints verified via public REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL and frontend smoke tested end-to-end through Playwright (Home, Destinations, Packages w/ filter, About, Contact). Contact form submission persisted to DB and confirmed via GET /api/inquiries. Zero console errors across navigation flow.
passed: POST /api/inquiries valid payload -> 200 returns Inquiry with id and created_at
POST /api/inquiries missing fields -> 422 with pydantic missing-field details for email/phone/message
GET /api/inquiries -> 200 list including new inquiry, sorted desc by created_at (verified post-submit)
Navbar: all 5 nav items (home, destinations, packages, about-us, contact) present and navigable
Destinations page: all 6 destination-detail blocks (darjeeling, gangtok, pelling, kalimpong, lachung, tsomgo) rendered
Packages page: pkg-darjeeling-delight & pkg-gangtok-getaway rendered; filter-bestseller reduced visible cards 12 -> 2
Contact: form filled (name/email/phone/message) and submitted via inquiry-submit; success toast 'Thanks! Your inquiry is in...' displayed
Inquiry persisted in MongoDB; GET /api/inquiries returns T1 Tester as latest entry
Zero console errors observed during full page traversal
